display.purpose: Modal titles and landing headings; the largest UI text, kept deliberately modest (~1.5rem).

headline.purpose: Topbar page titles and primary section headings.

body.purpose: The workhorse: task copy, form values, table cells. Prose caps 65-75ch.

label.purpose: Uppercase 10px nav-group headers, role chips, in-component eyebrows.

mono.purpose: SQL, batch numbers, logs, generated scripts. Tabular figures.

shadows.name: hairline
shadows.purpose: Sticky topbar separation over scrolling content.

shadows.name: ambient-card
shadows.purpose: Glass auth card and raised panels; diffuse and low-opacity.

shadows.name: iris-glow
shadows.purpose: The only colored shadow; reserved for primary buttons.

motion.name: ease-standard
motion.purpose: Default easing for state transitions (colors, transforms).

motion.name: duration-fast
motion.purpose: Color/hover state changes on nav items, links, inputs.

motion.name: button-lift
motion.purpose: Primary-button hover lift; presses to scale(0.98) on active.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The committed action. Iris gradient fill with a reserved colored glow and a vertical sheen sweep on hover.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { position: relative; overflow: hidden; background: linear-gradient(to bottom, #6366f1, #4338ca); color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; font-weight: 600; padding: 12px 16px; border: none; border-radius: 0.875rem; box-shadow: 0 4px 6px rgba(99,102,241,0.25); cursor: pointer; transition: transform 200ms cubic-bezier(0.4,0,0.2,1), box-shadow 200ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { transform: translateY(-0.125rem); box-shadow: 0 6px 12px rgba(99,102,241,0.30); } .ds-btn-primary:active { transform: scale(0.98); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,0.35); }

components.name: Ghost Icon Button
components.description: Topbar/toolbar control. Transparent at rest, zinc wash on hover.
components.html: <button class="ds-btn-ghost" aria-label="Toggle theme"><svg viewBox="0 0 24 24" width="20" height="20" fill="none" stroke="currentColor" stroke-width="2" stroke-linecap="round" stroke-linejoin="round"><path d="M12 3a6 6 0 0 0 9 9 9 9 0 1 1-9-9Z"/></svg></button>
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; padding: 8px; color: #71717a; background: transparent; border: none; border-radius: 0.375rem; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms, color 150ms; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #f4f4f5; color: #18181b; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,0.25); }

components.name: Active Nav Item
components.description: Sidebar link. Idle is muted ink; the active state is Iris text on an Iris wash — the clearest 'you are here'.
components.html: All toolsHistory
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 4px; width: 232px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; padding: 8px 12px; border-radius: 0.625rem; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #71717a; text-decoration: none; transition: color 150ms, background 150ms; } .ds-nav-item:hover { color: #18181b; background: #f4f4f5; } .ds-nav-item--active { color: #4f46e5; background: #eef2ff; font-weight: 600; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Form field with the crisp Iris focus ring (box-shadow, no layout shift).
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; box-sizing: border-box; background: #fff; color: #18181b; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; padding: 10px 12px; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 0.875rem; transition: box-shadow 150ms, border-color 150ms; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #71717a; } .ds-input:focus { outline: none; border-color: #6366f1; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px rgba(99,102,241,0.20); }

components.name: Working Card
components.description: Flat, border-defined content surface for the in-task instrument. No shadow, no glass, never nested.
components.html:
Rollback script

FK-safe reverse order generated for 42 statements across 6 tables.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #fff; border: 1px solid #e4e4e7; border-radius: 0.875rem; padding: 24px; } .ds-card-title { margin: 0 0 8px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1rem; font-weight: 600; color: #18181b; } .ds-card-body { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; line-height: 1.6; color: #71717a; }

components.name: Count Badge
components.description: Attention pill for pending requests / unread notifications. Amber for pending, rose for urgent.
components.css: .ds-badge { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; min-width: 18px; height: 18px; padding: 0 6px; background: #f59e0b; color: #fff; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 10px; font-weight: 700; line-height: 1; border-radius: 9999px; }

components.name: Glass Auth Card
components.description: The platform's handshake: translucent, blurred, Iris-topped card over the aurora backdrop. Frame-only material.
components.html:
Welcome back

Sign in to Delivery Toolbox
components.css: .ds-glass { position: relative; overflow: hidden; max-width: 360px; padding: 32px; background: rgba(255,255,255,0.72); backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(180%); -webkit-backdrop-filter: blur(16px) saturate(180%); border: 1px solid rgba(24,24,27,0.08); border-top: 1px solid rgba(99,102,241,0.30); border-radius: 1rem; box-shadow: 0 8px 32px rgba(24,24,27,0.07); } .ds-glass-title { margin: 0 0 4px; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 1.5rem; font-weight: 700; letter-spacing: -0.02em; color: #18181b; } .ds-glass-sub { margin: 0; font-family: Inter, system-ui, sans-serif; font-size: 0.875rem; color: #71717a; }

narrative.overview: Delivery Toolbox is a precise instrument you trust with production data, reading as modern and premium to earn the confidence of internal teams and external clients alike. The premium impression is carried by the frame — aurora-and-glass auth surfaces, a backdrop-blurred sticky topbar, the breathing glow behind the brand mark. Inside the frame, working surfaces are crisp and utilitarian: dense legible single-family type, flat border-defined cards, and a sidebar that yields the screen to the content. Glass is for arrival and identity; the instrument is for work. Every tool is built from this one system, so a new tool is recognizable as part of the whole on first glance.
keyCharacteristics: Iris-indigo as the single voice of action and selection, against zinc neutrals.
One type family (Inter) doing headings, labels, body, and data; JetBrains Mono for code and SQL.
Glass and aurora at the frame; flat, crisp surfaces in the task.
Light and dark are co-equal, class-toggled, and remembered before first paint.
Soft ambient depth with a reserved colored glow, never structural heaviness.

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Iris is the only saturated hue permitted to carry meaning on a working surface. State colors speak only for their state.

rules.name: The Cool-Neutral Rule
rules.body: Neutrals are zinc, never warm. No cream, sand, or beige backgrounds; warmth is carried by Iris and finish.

rules.name: The One Family Rule
rules.body: Inter does everything except code. Never introduce a display or brand font for headings.

rules.name: The Modest Display Rule
rules.body: The largest UI text tops out around 1.5rem. No fluid clamp() hero type in the app.

rules.name: The Reserved Glow Rule
rules.body: Colored shadow belongs to primary actions and nothing else; its rarity is what makes the primary button obvious.

rules.name: The Glass-Is-The-Platform Rule
rules.body: backdrop-filter blur is permitted only on the topbar and unauthenticated frame; forbidden as decoration on working surfaces.

dos: Do keep Iris (#6366f1 / #4f46e5) as the single action-and-selection voice; let zinc neutrals carry everything else.
Do use one family (Inter) for all UI text and JetBrains Mono only for code, SQL, batch numbers, and logs.
Do define every interactive state — default, hover, focus, active, disabled, loading, error — for every control.
Do reserve backdrop-filter glass for the topbar and auth frame, and the colored Iris glow for primary buttons only.
Do honor prefers-reduced-motion: keep every new animation behind the same guard the CSS already uses.
Do teach on arrival — meaningful empty states, plain error copy, visible affordances — because clients and unfamiliar teams self-serve.
Do keep working surfaces flat and border-defined; separate with the second tonal layer, not heavy shadow.
donts: Don't ship the generic Bootstrap admin look: boxy stock cards, template icons, indistinct layouts.
Don't recreate cluttered legacy-enterprise density — grey, cramped, intimidating Oracle-Forms walls of fields.
Don't go playful consumer/startup: no gradients-everywhere, no emoji, no bounce/elastic easing.
Don't ship sterile, personality-free plainness; the glass frame and Iris finish are the craft.
Don't introduce a second type family or fluid clamp() hero type inside the app.
Don't nest cards, and never use a border-left/border-right colored stripe as an accent.
Don't let muted text drop below Ink Soft (#71717a) for body-adjacent text, and never place gray text on an Iris background.
Don't glow, gradient, or glass a data table, working card, or tool panel; those materials belong to the frame.
